query: Research the Sales Engagement Platform (SEP) market for Series A-C SaaS companies. We want to find EDPs to help sell our lead list building service.
expected_behavior: Identifies key SEP pain points such as CRM sync lags, rep data entry overhead, or stale contact data bounce rates
Formulates 5-7 actionable Existential Data Points with precise thresholds
Provides an outreach hook mapping each EDP to sales execution relevance
Presents 3 distinct pain-based segments with customized outbound opening lines
Cites verified sources for market size or CRM waste metrics
